test.summary: 6 test failures persist: 2 E2E test suite loading issues (Playwright configuration error, missing hook file .factory/hooks/paperclip-runtime-support.mjs), 4 CLI test failures (issue-archive-stale-command test exit handling, issue-liveness test help flag output and triad reviewer packet)

typecheck.summary: drizzle-orm type errors persist in server/src/board-claim.ts and server/src/services/workspace-runtime.ts - package resolution issue with duplicate drizzle-orm versions (0.38.4 with different dependency resolutions: postgres@3.4.5 vs postgres@3.4.8)

lint.summary: Lint is mapped to typecheck, same failures as typecheck

blockingIssues.description: Typecheck fails with drizzle-orm type errors in server/src/board-claim.ts and server/src/services/workspace-runtime.ts. This is a pnpm package resolution issue where different packages resolve different versions of drizzle-orm (0.38.4 with postgres@3.4.5 vs postgres@3.4.8), causing type mismatches. Pre-existing infrastructure issue unrelated to root-cause milestone.
blockingIssues.suggestedFix: Add pnpm overrides to enforce consistent drizzle-orm version across all packages, or investigate why different dependency trees resolve different postgres versions.

blockingIssues.description: Test suite has 6 failing tests: E2E tests fail due to Playwright configuration error (test.describe called in wrong context) and missing hook file (.factory/hooks/paperclip-runtime-support.mjs). CLI tests fail for issue-archive-stale-command (command exit handling) and issue-liveness (help flag output, triad reviewer packet). Pre-existing infrastructure issues unrelated to root-cause milestone.
blockingIssues.suggestedFix: 1) Fix Playwright E2E test configuration, 2) Create missing hook file or fix test import, 3) Investigate CLI test failures. These appear to be pre-existing infrastructure issues.

notes: Round 2 re-validation confirms same blocking issues as Round 1. The root-cause milestone work (trace-spawn-code-path and determine-root-cause features) completed successfully and produced documentation in .factory/library/root-cause-setup-time-model-resolution.md (114 lines). The milestone commits only added documentation, no code changes. Validator failures are pre-existing infrastructure issues that have been blocking validation across multiple milestones (see wiki-compile rounds 4-6). The milestone work itself is sound - the root cause analysis correctly identifies that setup-time Task spawn model resolution does not use the same path as execution-time resolution.
